scopeContract.rowCoverageRule: Every M31 queue row and every M29 transfer to M31 must be implemented, mapped-consumed, or transferred exactly once.
scopeContract.recruitBoundary: M31 owns recruit listing visibility, listing-to-template mapping, price checks, money failure, duplicate/repeat/roster failure, cancel, and creation of people/body/social/equipment containers.
scopeContract.transferBoundary: Retirement/sale lifecycle, detailed identity/body/equipment semantics, and event story text transfer to their owner milestones instead of being hidden inside recruit.
